## Summary

<!-- 1–3 bullets explaining the user-facing change. Not "I edited file X" — what behavior changed and why. -->

-
-

## Linked issue

<!-- "Fixes #123" or "Refs #456". Use "N/A" only for trivial chores. -->

Fixes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behavior not to work as expected)
- [ ] Docs / chore / refactor (no behavior change)

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this works? Commands you ran, screens you clicked through. -->

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npx vitest run`
- [ ] `go test ./... -count=1`
- [ ] Manually tested in `npm run dev` on: <!-- macOS-arm64 / macOS-intel / Windows -->

## Screenshots / recordings (UI changes only)

<!-- Before / after if visual. Drag-drop images directly here. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] UI changes follow [DESIGN.md](../DESIGN.md) tokens
- [ ] If renderer strings changed, both `src/renderer/i18n/zh.ts` and `en.ts` are updated
- [ ] No `Co-Authored-By: Claude` (or other AI) trailers in commit messages
